creator: graudeejs@gmail.com
text:
After updating ports tree and trying to install KDE on fresh system, gtk2 fails to build with error message that: cairo must have x11 support or something like that (sorry, I can't tell exactly)

However If I cd to graphics/cairo and run make install clean and the cd back to kde (or gtk) and run make install, gtk will be installed without problem.

I suppose gkt Makefile is missing something (perhaps this is after recent migrations to OptionsNG)
